bupt.ta.model.AdminSettings

Package
Description

  • Uses of AdminSettings in bupt.ta.service

    Methods in bupt.ta.service with parameters of type AdminSettings
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AdminService.DashboardSummary
    AdminService.buildDashboardSummary(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Computes dashboard totals and workload-cap indicators.
    AdminService.MonitoringReport
    AdminService.buildMonitoringReport(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Builds anomaly and capacity alerts for the admin monitoring page.
    List<AdminService.WorkloadRow>
    AdminService.buildWorkloadRows(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Lists each TA's selected workload for the admin workload page.
    int
    AdminService.enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String keepApplicationId, AdminSettings settings)
    Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.
    int
    AdminService.enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.
    boolean
    EmailNotificationService.isConfigured(AdminSettings adminSettings)
     
    EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings
    EmailNotificationService.loadSettings(AdminSettings adminSettings)
     
    String
    EmailNotificationService.maybeAppendPortalLink(String body, String relativePath, AdminSettings adminSettings)
     
    EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult
    EmailOtpService.requestOtp(DataStorage storage, String email, String purpose, AdminSettings adminSettings)
    Generates an OTP, persists it, and sends it via email (HTML + text).
    String
    EmailNotificationService.resolvePortalUrl(String relativePath, AdminSettings adminSettings)
    Builds an absolute portal URL for a relative path.
    EmailNotificationService.SendResult
    EmailNotificationService.sendHtml(String to, String subject, String plainBody, String htmlBody, AdminSettings adminSettings)
    Sends a multipart alternative message (plain + HTML).
    EmailNotificationService.SendResult
    EmailNotificationService.sendPlainText(String to, String subject, String body, AdminSettings adminSettings)
     
    boolean
    AdminService.wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, Job job, AdminSettings settings)
    Returns true when selecting this applicant for job would meet or exceed the admin workload cap.
